title: NumPy & Pandas for ML Quiz
description: Test your data preprocessing and feature engineering knowledge.

questions.question: Why should you call scaler.fit_transform() on training data but only scaler.transform() on test data?

options.text: The test set doesn't need scaling
Fitting on test data would leak statistical information from the test set, giving artificially good results
This is just a style convention, not technically important
Ensures the class proportion in y is preserved in both train and test splits
Splits the data by the y column value
Ensures no duplicate rows in the splits

questions.question: What is one-hot encoding used for in machine learning?

options.text: Converting categorical variables into binary columns so algorithms can process them without implying ordinal relationships
